name: HAWKINS INC
summary: Hawkins Inc. is a leading water treatment and specialty ingredients company that formulates, manufactures, distributes, and blends products across three segments: Water Treatment, Industrial, and Health and Nutrition. Products include sodium hypochlorite, acids, alkalis, food and pharmaceutical-grade salts, liquid phosphates, lactates, and nutraceutical ingredients such as minerals, vitamins, amino acids, and botanicals. The company serves municipalities, industrial processors, and health product manufacturers, operating out of 50+ warehouses primarily in the United States.

products.name: Sodium Hypochlorite (Bleach)
products.description: Manufactured chemical used in water treatment and industrial applications.

products.name: Liquid Phosphates and Lactates
products.description: Food and pharmaceutical-grade blended products manufactured by the Industrial Group.

products.name: Caustic Soda, Sulfuric Acid, Hydrochloric Acid
products.description: Bulk industrial chemicals received, stored, and distributed to industrial customers.

products.name: Agricultural Products
products.description: Chemicals including urea, aqua ammonia, and potassium hydroxide sold seasonally for agriculture.

products.name: Nutraceutical Ingredients
products.description: Minerals, vitamins, amino acids, botanicals, sweeteners, and enzymes for health and nutrition manufacturers.

products.name: Water Treatment Chemicals and Equipment
products.description: Chemicals, equipment, and services for potable water, wastewater, and pool water treatment systems.

products.name: Custom Chemical Blending
products.description: Custom blending of chemicals per customer formulas and specifications.
